title: dryopteris borreri
intro: Dryopteris borreri, also known as Borrer's fern or the Irish oak fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteris genus. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving joint pain, and treating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Dryopteris borreri is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
